title: Adam Dead or Alive
wikitext:
[]: Adam: Dead or Alive?             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Nov 13, 2009 11:43 pm This topic may get a bit metaphysical. My question: Is Adam, in the form of the embryo we see in episode #08, actually alive or dead? Now on the one hand, we have Kaji's fairly straightforward comment. Episode #08 wrote: Kaji: It's already restored itself this far. It's frozen inside dura-bakelite, but it's still alive .

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Nov 14, 2009 12:08 am I suspect its decay was because of Gendo's interference, or perhaps Lilith has also been decaying over the course of the six-ish years without a soul and her marshmallow apperance is a part of this. I don't think there's much of an answer to get out of this, though.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 14, 2009 12:33 am Being soulless isn't the same as dead. Case in point, the soulless Rei clones that are very much alive until Ritsuko menstruates all over the place with her emotional baggage. The Adam fetus is very much alive, it wasn't decaying, it was just merged with Gendo's flesh.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 14, 2009 2:30 am I thought Adam's body was alive in the same way Lilith's is. Legend: Isn't Lilith's marshmellow...ness around way back during that 23' Eva-01 & Lilith CE/surrogate-daughter image?

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Sat Nov 14, 2009 7:03 am They're probably alive as vegetables.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Nov 14, 2009 12:40 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Being soulless isn't the same as dead. Case in point, the soulless Rei clones that are very much alive .....

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 14, 2009 1:53 pm However, we know that the Rei clones are responsible for the dummy system, so is it really valid to say they are entirely inert beings? Moreover, does this apply to the Lilith mass in Terminal Dogma. Here we have this mass seemingly responding to Rei's "I'm Home" comment in #26'.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Nov 14, 2009 4:53 pm Adam is alive but kinda in a stasis lock. She seems to be able to rebuild herself but nothing more seeing as the soul is within Kaworu.
